Site information

Contact

Use the contact page for site feedback, corrections, or partnership discussion.

Email: guan@shanyuegroup.com

Please include the page URL if you are reporting a correction or wording issue.

What to include in your message

If you are reporting a factual issue, include the page URL, the sentence in question, and what should be corrected. That makes updates faster and avoids unclear back-and-forth.

If you are asking about collaboration, keep the request specific so it is easy to review whether it fits the site.

Response scope

Messages are reviewed for site corrections, practical content suggestions, and relevant business inquiries. General support questions that are already answered on the site may be redirected to the most relevant guide page.

Chopsticks Guide

This site explains chopstick use, materials, etiquette, and cultural context for educational reference. It does not provide medical, nutritional, or product safety guarantees.
